_description: Cloudflare reported ERR_GOP_OUT_OF_RANGE (keyframe interval out of range). videoUID and hlsUrl are null. Player shows idle UX (not a visible error message) — the error code is logged to debug panel only.
_player_behavior: errorCode is logged to debug panel. Since ERR_GOP_OUT_OF_RANGE is NOT in errorMessages config, player shows idle UX (no visible error). If it WERE in errorMessages, the text from that key would be displayed.
